subcodes.first_line: O thou pure and unsullied one! The essence of purity and cleanliness is to sanctify the heart with the water that descendeth from the heaven of divine manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طیب طاهر اصل طهر و پاکی قلب را بماء منزل از سماء تجلی پاک و مقدس نمودنست
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @living waters; water of life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
